title: Eli Lilly Hands China Rights for Breast Cancer Drug Verzenio to Innovent Biologics
summary: Shanghai: Eli Lilly has transferred the mainland China commercialization rights for its breast cancer drug Verzenios to Innovent Biologics, the Chinese drugmaker said Tuesday, as its U.S. partner...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
contentHtml:
Shanghai: Eli Lilly has transferred the mainland China commercialization rights for its breast cancer drug Verzenios to Innovent Biologics, the Chinese drugmaker said Tuesday, as its U.S. partner grapples with generic competition in the world's second-largest pharmaceutical тАМmarket.

In тБаa statement, тБаInnovent said it entered into an agreement that grants it тАЛsole commercialization rights for Verzenios, which Lilly has also called Verzenio, in mainland тАЛChina, adding that Lilly would continue manufacturing, supplying and developing the drug. Innovent's statement did not mention financial тАЛterms.

Lilly did not immediately respond тБаto a тАМReuters request for comment on what would тАЛhappen to тАЛthe China sales team for Verzenio, a тБаdrug it began supplying in China in 2021, тАЛaccording to a post on its official тАЛWeChat account.

Lilly's pullback in a country where more than 350,000 patients are diagnosed with breast cancer annually follows local approval of a generic version from a unit of China's Qingfeng Pharmaceutical Group this year.

A spokesperson тАМfor Innovent did not immediately respond to a Reuters request for comment on generic тАЛcompetition. In the тАЛfourth quarter of тБа2025, Verzenio revenue outside the U.S. was $608 million, Lilly said in February.

Lilly has never disclosed official Chinese sales figures, тАЛsaid Tony Ren, head of Asia healthcare research at Macquarie Capital. When a drug loses patent protection or exclusivity, many large pharmaceutical companies would try to offload it, Ren added.

Source : Reuters
